requirements.desc: When flow get guardrail is called, load from <preset>/guardrail.json (not templates/<lang>/)
requirements.note: readGuardrailFile(dir) now reads path.join(dir, GUARDRAIL_FILENAME) directly, replacing the templates/<lang>/ path construction in readWithFallback()

requirements.desc: Preset chain loader shall not perform language-based path construction or fallback
requirements.note: readWithFallback() removed entirely; readGuardrailFile() has no lang parameter, no primary/fallback branching

requirements.desc: Move en/guardrail.json content to <preset>/guardrail.json for all 17 presets
requirements.note: All renames show similarity index 100% preserving English content. Actual count is 28 presets (spec undercounted at 17), but all presets that had guardrail files are covered

requirements.desc: Delete all templates/en/guardrail.json and templates/ja/guardrail.json files
requirements.note: All templates/ja/guardrail.json files deleted; all templates/en/guardrail.json files renamed out of templates/ to preset root (effectively removed from templates/)

requirements.desc: Remove lang parameter from internal preset chain guardrail loader
requirements.note: lang removed from resolveGuardrailContext return value, loadPresetGuardrails signature, and loadMergedGuardrails call site

requirements.desc: All existing callers (get-guardrail, run-gate, run-lint) continue to work without modification
requirements.note: loadMergedGuardrails(root) public signature unchanged; diff contains no changes to get-guardrail.js, run-gate.js, or run-lint.js

unplanned.change: loadJsonFile now attaches err.code = 'ERR_MISSING_FILE' to the thrown error — not in requirements, added to support discriminated error handling in resolveGuardrailContext (review item #4)

resolveGuardrailContext now rethrows errors whose code is not ERR_MISSING_FILE instead of silently swallowing all errors — not in requirements, fixes silent error suppression identified in gate/review

summary.notes: All 6 requirements are fully satisfied. Two unplanned changes exist in src/lib/: an error code discriminator added to loadJsonFile and a targeted catch in resolveGuardrailContext — both are defensive quality improvements approved during review (review item #4) and gate (issue-log entry). Preset count discrepancy (28 actual vs 17 in spec) is a spec undercount, not an over-delivery issue; the requirement intent ('all presets') is met.
